subject: Rogue Thought's Chamber
fact: The party entered a dimly lit chamber filled with graven images of skulls and brains shimmering with the alien pulse of concentrated Faerzress.
source_quote: The party enters a dimly lit chamber filled with graven images of skulls and brains, shimmering with the alien pulse of concentrated Faerzress

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought was found sipping from decorative brain jars in his chamber.
source_quote: where they find Rogue Thought sipping from decorative brain jars

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought's voice echoed in the party's minds as he declared he had been waiting for them.
source_quote: Rogue Thought's voice echoes in the party's minds as he declares he has been waiting for them

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Four Githyanki warriors joined the fray to protect Rogue Thought.
source_quote: Four Githyanki warriors join the fray

subject: Githyanki declaration
fact: One Githyanki warrior shouted that their master wished the party dead.
source_quote: with one shouting that their master wishes the party dead

subject: Githyanki attack on Daein
fact: A Githyanki warrior attacked Daein with a greatsword but failed to land a blow.
source_quote: A Githyanki warrior attacks Daein with a greatsword but fails to land a blow

subject: Rogue Thought attacks Bramgrim
fact: Rogue Thought used the ambient Faerzress to strike at Bramgrim.
source_quote: Rogue Thought uses the ambient Faerzress to strike at Bramgrim

subject: Githyanki attack on Akritas
fact: Another Githyanki warrior charged Akritas and delivered a punishing strike with a greatsword.
source_quote: Another Githyanki warrior charges Akritas, delivering a punishing strike with a greatsword

subject: Bramgrim summons guardians
fact: Bramgrim summoned spectral guardians to scorch the enemies.
source_quote: Bramgrim summons spectral guardians to scorch the enemies

subject: Githyanki slowed
fact: Bramgrim's spectral guardians slowed several Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: slowing several Githyanki warriors

subject: Akritas attacks warrior
fact: Akritas fired her bow at a warrior and landed a precise and heavy hit.
source_quote: Akritas fires her bow at a warrior, landing a precise and heavy hit

subject: Githyanki misty step
fact: Two Githyanki warriors used misty step to teleport away from the spectral guardians.
source_quote: Two Githyanki warriors use misty step to teleport away from the spectral guardians

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear rushed into the room and delivered a powerful strike to the Mind Flayer.
source_quote: The Owlbear rushes into the room and delivers a powerful strike to the Mind Flayer

subject: Felkur fireball
fact: Felkur unleashed a massive fireball that engulfed the Mind Flayer and several Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: Felkur unleashes a massive fireball that engulfs the Mind Flayer and several Githyanki warriors

subject: Daein charges Mind Flayer
fact: Daein charged the Mind Flayer and delivered a series of punishing blows that left the creature near death.
source_quote: Daein charges the Mind Flayer, delivering a series of punishing blows that leave the creature near death

subject: Rogue Thought self-mutilation
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles.
source_quote: severs its own tentacles

subject: Rogue Thought escape
fact: Rogue Thought used a planar spell to escape to another dimension.
source_quote: uses a planar spell to escape to another dimension

subject: Rogue Thought's revenge
fact: Rogue Thought warned that his revenge and Graz'zt's revenge were not finished.
source_quote: warning that his revenge and Graz'zt's revenge are not finished

subject: Bramgrim finishes Githyanki
fact: Bramgrim used holy energy and a powerful cantrip to finish off the last remaining Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: Bramgrim uses holy energy and a powerful cantrip to finish off the last remaining Githyanki warriors

subject: Tentacle collection
fact: The party collected the severed tentacles as proof of their victory.
source_quote: The party collects the severed tentacles as proof of their victory

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz traveled with the party back to Sporedome.
source_quote: Arrizz travels with the party back to Sporedome

subject: Arrizz departure
fact: Arrizz parted ways with the party at Sporedome.
source_quote: then parts ways

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz said he hoped never to meet the party again but acknowledged they always seem to show up when he needs saving.
source_quote: saying he hopes never to meet them again but acknowledges they always seem to show up when he needs saving

subject: Hiring Mind Flayer
fact: The party met with the Mind Flayer who hired them to report their success.
source_quote: The party meets with the Mind Flayer who hired them and presents the severed tentacles as proof of the rogue's defeat

subject: severed tentacles
fact: The party presented the severed tentacles as proof of the rogue's defeat.
source_quote: presents the severed tentacles as proof of the rogue's defeat

subject: rod of the pact keeper
fact: The Mind Flayer rewarded the party with a rod of the pact keeper.
source_quote: The Mind Flayer rewards the party with a rod of the pact keeper

subject: upgraded wand of the war mage
fact: The Mind Flayer rewarded the party with an upgraded wand of the war mage.
source_quote: and an upgraded wand of the war mage

subject: Information promise
fact: The Mind Flayer promised to share vital information with the Order of the Gauntlet rather than directly with the party.
source_quote: and promises to share vital information with the Order of the Gauntlet rather than directly with the party

subject: Hillsfar
fact: The party traveled back to Hillsfar.
source_quote: The party travels back to Hillsfar

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana invited the party to a private dinner.
source_quote: and is invited to a private dinner by Isthana

subject: three bottles of rare wine
fact: Isthana presented Felkur with three bottles of rare wine.
source_quote: Isthana presents Felkur with three bottles of rare wine

subject: Business discussion
fact: The party discussed the idea of retiring from adventuring to start a restaurant.
source_quote: The party discusses the idea of retiring from adventuring to start a business, specifically a restaurant

subject: Isthana patronage offer
fact: Isthana offered her patronage and protection for the party's business.
source_quote: Isthana offers her patronage and protection for their business

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana implied that any venture without her support would likely struggle.
source_quote: implying that any venture without her support would likely struggle

subject: Isthana's motive
fact: The group realized Isthana views them as powerful assets and insurance for the city's protection.
source_quote: The group realizes Isthana views them as powerful assets and insurance for the city's protection

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur privately reflected on his secret past as the 'Phantom Thief' while maintaining his current cover as a simple gnome artificer.
source_quote: Felkur privately reflects on his secret past as the 'Phantom Thief' while maintaining his current cover as a simple gnome artificer

subject: Dinner conclusion
fact: Isthana left the door open for future business deals at the end of the dinner.
source_quote: The dinner concludes with Isthana leaving the door open for future business deals

subject: Party refusal to sign
fact: The party declined to sign anything yet.
source_quote: and the party declining to sign anything yet

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: Akritas received a telepathic message from the Emerald Enclave.
source_quote: Akritas receives a telepathic message from the Emerald Enclave

subject: Emerald Enclave warning
fact: The message warned that fire giants in Szith Morcane are nearing completion of their work and have set their eyes on the surface.
source_quote: The message warns that fire giants in Szith Morcane are nearing completion of their work and have set their eyes on the surface

subject: Targeted regions
fact: The message stated the fire giants have set their eyes on the Dalelands and Hillsfar.
source_quote: specifically the Dalelands and Hillsfar

subject: brain-capped mushrooms
fact: The message noted that brain-capped mushrooms have been secured to push back the madness of Graz'zt.
source_quote: The message notes that brain-capped mushrooms have been secured to push back the madness of Graz'zt

subject: Szith Morcane mission
fact: The party was tasked with traveling to Szith Morcane to link up with the Drow resistance and the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv.
source_quote: The party is tasked with traveling to Szith Morcane to link up with the Drow resistance and the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: Mission goal
fact: The mission's goal is to stop the spread of Graz'zt's madness and drive out the fire giants before they reach the surface.
source_quote: The mission's goal is to stop the spread of Graz'zt's madness and drive out the fire giants before they reach the surface

subject: Rogue Mind Flayer's Lair
fact: The lair is a dark, dangerous complex filled with moss-covered chambers.
source_quote: A dark, dangerous complex filled with moss-covered chambers

subject: Rogue Mind Flayer's Lair
fact: The lair contains magically sealed doors requiring brains to open.
source_quote: magically sealed doors requiring brains to open

subject: Rogue Mind Flayer's Lair
fact: The lair contains freezing rooms used for preserving biological specimens.
source_quote: and freezing rooms used for preserving biological specimens

subject: The Brain Fridge
fact: The Brain Fridge is a freezing chamber within the lair kept at a much cooler temperature by columns of ice.
source_quote: A freezing chamber within the lair kept at a much cooler temperature by columns of ice

subject: large block of opaque ice
fact: The Brain Fridge contains a large block of opaque ice used to preserve suspended brains.
source_quote: containing a large block of opaque ice used to preserve suspended brains

subject: small vials of yellowish liquid
fact: The Brain Fridge contains small vials of yellowish liquid.
source_quote: small vials of yellowish liquid

subject: hidden copper plate
fact: The Brain Fridge contains a hidden copper plate with otherworldly symbols.
source_quote: and a hidden copper plate with otherworldly symbols

subject: Rogue Thought's Chamber
fact: The chamber is decorated with graven images of skulls and brains of varying sizes.
source_quote: A large room decorated with graven images of skulls and brains of varying sizes

subject: Rogue Thought's Chamber
fact: The chamber shimmers with the alien pulse of concentrated Faerzress.
source_quote: shimmering with the alien pulse of concentrated Faerzress

subject: Three tall decorative brain jars
fact: Three tall decorative brain jars stand at the center of Rogue Thought's Chamber.
source_quote: Three tall decorative brain jars stand at the center

subject: Rogue Thought's Chamber
fact: The chamber contains a large pile of cushions.
source_quote: alongside a large pile of cushions

subject: Rogue Thought's Chamber
fact: The acoustics in the chamber are so sharp that even the quietest whisper can be plainly heard.
source_quote: and the acoustics are so sharp that even the quietest whisper can be plainly heard

subject: Sporedome
fact: Sporedome is a fungal city in the Underdark.
source_quote: A fungal city in the Underdark

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Hillsfar is a major surface city.
source_quote: A major surface city

subject: Szith Morcane
fact: Szith Morcane is a location mentioned in the Emerald Enclave's message as being near an abundance of Faerzress.
source_quote: A location mentioned in the Emerald Enclave's message as being near an abundance of Faerzress

subject: Fire giants
fact: Fire giants currently control Szith Morcane.
source_quote: currently controlled by fire giants

subject: Fire giants
fact: The fire giants in Szith Morcane are nearing completion of their work.
source_quote: who are nearing completion of their work

subject: Fire giants
fact: The fire giants in Szith Morcane are threatening to invade the surface.
source_quote: and threatening to invade the surface

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz is a drow previously encountered by the party.
source_quote: A drow previously encountered by the party

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was found bound and tormented in the lair.
source_quote: who was found bound and tormented in the lair

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was suffering from demonic madness that was cured by a piece of magical mushroom.
source_quote: suffering from demonic madness that was cured by a piece of magical mushroom

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz agreed to travel with the party briefly in exchange for a beer.
source_quote: he agreed to travel with the party briefly in exchange for a beer

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a wizard the party is tasked with linking up with in Szith Morcane.
source_quote: the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv
